layer_note: This is a third, separate Nago layer (semantic root glyphs), distinct from the function-family (signage) and motif-family (narrative) axes. Do not merge.
premise: Nago is not an alphabet. It is a semantic writing and communication system. Each glyph represents a core concept rather than a sound. Meaning emerges through relationship, sequence, gesture, position, touch, song, and context.
design_principle: A language that cannot be accessed by all citizens cannot govern all citizens.
open_questions: Whether any of these nine root glyphs correspond visually to marks already present on the realized plates. Not yet checked.
Whether this root-glyph layer is meant to underlie the function-family and motif-family axes, or stand alongside them as an independent system. AWAITING FRAGMENT.
